---
title: "Textarea"
description: "Displays a form textarea or a component that looks like a textarea."
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
library(shiny)
library(shinyblocks)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Textarea

Displays a multi-line text input field.

## Usage

```r
library(shinyblocks)

block_textarea("textarea_id", placeholder = "Type your message here.")
```

## Examples

### Basic

A standard textarea with a placeholder.

<div class="sb-component-preview">
```{r, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
cat(as.character(block_textarea(
  "textarea_demo",
  placeholder = "Type your message here.",
  rows = 4
)))
```
</div>
<div class="sb-component-code-title">Code</div>
```r
block_textarea(
  "textarea_demo",
  placeholder = "Type your message here.",
  rows = 4
)
```

### With Label

Textareas can be wrapped in a field for labels and descriptions.

<div class="sb-component-preview">
```{r, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
cat(as.character(block_field(
  block_field_label("Bio", `for` = "bio"),
  block_textarea("bio", placeholder = "Tell us a little bit about yourself", rows = 4),
  block_field_description("You can @mention other users and organizations.")
)))
```
</div>
<div class="sb-component-code-title">Code</div>
```r
block_field(
  block_field_label("Bio", `for` = "bio"),
  block_textarea("bio", placeholder = "Tell us a little bit about yourself", rows = 4),
  block_field_description("You can @mention other users and organizations.")
)
```
